subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #045 The Most Great Infallibility
subcodes.first_line: Know that infallibility is of two kinds:  infallibility in essence and infallibility as an attribute.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که عصمت بر دو قسم است عصمت ذاتیه و عصمت صفاتیه
subcodes.subjects: @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @House of Justice
